title: Coral Up
description: Adds bushy and tall coral, obtained by bonemealing coral plants and fans.
body:
![A screenshot of a coral reef with the new variations added by this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b100d7380ff7837f5c84d6d7dd914ca48d7e1ac0.png)

# Coral Up
A small mod that adds new variations of coral: tall and bushy! 

Tall coral can be obtained by bonemealing regular corals, and bushy coral can be obtained by bonemealing coral fans.
